articles.title: Pentagon’s ouster of Anthropic opens doors for small AI rivals
articles.summary: Small defense industry artificial intelligence startups are suddenly fielding calls from generals, combatant commanders and deep-pocketed investors.

articles.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Finds Thousands of Zero-Day Flaws Across Major Systems
articles.summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) company Anthropic announced a new cybersecurity initiative called Project Glasswing that will use a preview version of its new frontier model, Claude Mythos, to find and address security vulnerabilities. The model will be used by a small set of organizations, including Amazon Web Services, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike,&
